tool_choice_rationale:
This strategy generates output that includes plain text, followed by a Prover9-formatted first-order logic formula.
The constrained decoder respects the grammar only between the "<<" and ">>" delimiters.
The strategy uses ConstrainedStep to ensure that the generated sequence is a valid Prover9 formula.
It rolls back to a valid prefix if necessary using RollbackToValidPrefix.
The strategy maintains invariants throughout the generation process to ensure correctness.
